'''√h-ng-t''' ('''hangata''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:latch|latch]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-ng-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:latch|latch]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √h-ng-t
|-
! Lemma
| hangata
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || hangatithi || hangatiji || hangatishi || hangati
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || hangatuthuth || hangatujuj || hangatushush || hangat
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || hangatuthu || hangatuju || hangatushu || hangatu
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || hangatufuth || hangatufuj || hangatufush || hangatuf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || hangatethe || hangateje || hangateshe || hangate
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || hangatothoth || hangatojoj || hangatoshosh || hangat
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || hangatotho || hangatojo || hangatosho || hangato
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || hangatofoth || hangatofoj || hangatofosh || hangatof
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || hangatïf || hangatïf || hangatïf || hangatïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || hangatïfïf || hangatïfïf || hangatïfïf || hangatïfïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || hangatïf || hangatïf || hangatïf || hangatïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || hangatïf || hangatïf || hangatïf || hangatïf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || hangatæthæ || hangatæjæ || hangatæshæ || hangatæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || hangatathath || hangatajaj || hangatashash || hangat
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || hangatatha || hangataja || hangatasha || hangata
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || hangatafath || hangatafaj || hangatafash || hangataf
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || hangatasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || gohangatasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || gokihangatasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || hangatnüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || gohangatnknüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokihangatnüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || hangatshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gohangatnkshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokihangatshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || hangatroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || gohangatnkroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokihangatroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || hangatmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || gohangatnkmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokihangatmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || hangatsherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || gohangatnksherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokihangatsherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || hangatngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || gohangatnkngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokihangatngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || hangatyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || gohangatnkyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokihangatyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || hangatyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || gohangatnkyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokihangatyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || hangatnüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gohangatnknüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokihangatnüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || hangatnüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gohangatnknüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokihangatnüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || hangatnümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gohangatnknümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokihangatnümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || hangatshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gohangatnkshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokihangatshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || hangatshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gohangatnkshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokihangatshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || hangatshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gohangatnkshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokihangatshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || hangatronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gohangatnkronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokihangatronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || hangatroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gohangatnkroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokihangatroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || hangatromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gohangatnkromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokihangatromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || hangatmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gohangatnkmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokihangatmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || hangatmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gohangatnkmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokihangatmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || hangatmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gohangatnkmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokihangatmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || hangat
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || hængæt
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || hohangat
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || hohængæt
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || hohohangat
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || hohohængæt
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || nühangat
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || nühængæt
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || nünühangat
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || nünühængæt
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || nïhangat
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || nïhængæt
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || nïnïhangat
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || nïnïhængæt
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || luhangat
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || luhængæt
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || luluhangat
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || luluhængæt
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || lihangat
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || lihængæt
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || lilihangat
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || lilihængæt
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || kohangat
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || kohængæt
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || kokohangat
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || kokohængæt
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || kehangat
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || kehængæt
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || kekehangat
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || kekehængæt
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d176386}}
